name: Lemon Asparagus and Carrots
recipeInstructions:
PER SERVING: 26 cal., 1g Pro., 6g Carbo., 0g fat, 0mg Chol., 19mg Sodium
238mg Potassium
1. Wash and trim the small carrots.
2. Place the carrots in a steamer basket above boiling water. Cover and steam for about 15 minutes or until crisp-tender.
3. Remove from heat and rinse the carrots in cold water, then drain.
4. Cook the frozen asparagus spears according to package instructions. Rinse the asparagus in cold water and drain.
5. Chill the drained carrots and asparagus.
6. To serve, arrange the carrots and asparagus on a platter.
7. Sprinkle with a little lemon juice and lemon pepper.
